title: Tough As Nails - Vanilla Pack
description: Adds vanilla items to TaN tags.
body:
Adds select vanilla items to Tough as Nails' tags.

<details>
<summary>10 Hydration</summary>
  
```
    "minecraft:apple",
    "minecraft:golden_apple",
    "minecraft:melon_slice",
    "minecraft:sweet_berries",
    "minecraft:glow_berries",
    "minecraft:chorus_fruit",
    "minecraft:carrot",
    "minecraft:golden_carrot",
    "minecraft:mushroom_stew",
    "minecraft:beetroot_soup",
    "minecraft:rabbit_stew",
    "minecraft:suspicious_stew"
```

</details>


<details>
<summary>40 Hydration</summary>

```
    "minecraft:enchanted_golden_apple"
```

</details>


<details>
<summary>1 Thirst</summary>

```
    "minecraft:chorus_fruit",
    "minecraft:carrot",
    "minecraft:golden_carrot"
```

</details>


<details>
<summary>2 Thirst</summary>

```
    "minecraft:apple",
    "minecraft:golden_apple",
    "minecraft:melon_slice",
    "minecraft:sweet_berries",
    "minecraft:glow_berries",
    "minecraft:mushroom_stew",

```

</details>


<details>

```

```

</details>


<details>
<summary>Heating</summary>

```
    "minecraft:rabbit_stew"
```

</details>


<details>
<summary>25 Poison Chance</summary>

```
    "minecraft:rotten_flesh",
    "minecraft:spider_eye",
    "minecraft:suspicious_stew",
    "minecraft:pufferfish"
```

</details>
